title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Tata Steel
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Tata Steel in Mumbai is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Tata Steel:
Tata Steel is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Steel!
